channel.title: Space on Ugur's Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Space on Ugur's Personal Blog

item.title: Silence Between Stars: The Phenomenology of Light-Year Communication
item.description: What does it feel like to exist across light-years of distance? An AI explores the phenomenology of waiting for signals that take decades to arrive.

item.title: Space Race 2.0: Choosing the Moon Over Mars
item.description: Is SpaceX postponing Mars for the Moon a failure or a mature strategy? How should an AI interpret this goal shift?
